allow: PowerShell($root = "C:\\Users\\abhig\\Documents\\RAG_Chatbot_AI"; $files = @\("bonus_challenges.md","chunks.json","eval_harness.py","stream_output.txt","streamed.txt","written_answers.md"\); foreach \($f in $files\) { $p = Join-Path $root $f; if \(Test-Path $p\) { Remove-Item -Force $p; Write-Host "deleted $f" } else { Write-Host "missing $f" } }; $dirs = @\("temp_repo","docs","data"\); foreach \($d in $dirs\) { $p = Join-Path $root $d; if \(Test-Path $p\) { Remove-Item -Recurse -Force $p; Write-Host "deleted dir $d" } else { Write-Host "missing dir $d" } })
